instructions: This repository is the curated NeonConductor marketplace source. Reviews should prioritize package provenance, license evidence, deterministic catalog generation, selected-file install safety, and clean TypeScript tooling.

rules.rule: Do not make NeonConductor install from upstream source repositories. Upstream repository URL, commit, and path are provenance only; installable content comes from the vendored MarketPlace-NC package at the catalog commit.

Generated file manifests must remain deterministic, package-relative, path-safe, and hash-verifiable. Do not allow absolute paths, parent traversal, backslashes, generated metadata files, or hand-authored distribution.files entries.

Package changes must preserve source repository URL, pinned source commit, source-relative path, SPDX license expression, license evidence path, license evidence SHA-256, review status, and required notices.
Do not add GitHub Releases, GitHub Packages, real mode packages, deployment environments beyond Pages catalogs, or automatic upstream update behavior unless a later phase explicitly asks for it.
